sourceSummary.oneLine: Clinical report comparing HAD1417MCW of ADD radiographic images with S4335AW of GR40CW using DICOM 3.0 image acquisition and radiologist evaluation.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports a 510(k) submission appendix clinical test report by documenting comparative clinical image quality evaluation.
keyPoints: Objective Device is stated as HAD1417MCW of ADD by H&Abyz Co., Ltd.
Comparative Equipment is stated as S4335AW of GR40CW made by Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd.
One radiologist, Dr. Jung Man Lee, evaluated images using grades S, A, B, and C.
The report compares 30 radiographic views and reports total average scores of 3.46 for S4335AW and 3.61 for HAD1417MCW.
The conclusion states that HAD1417MCW images are comparable or superior to S4335AW images and that spatial and soft tissue contrast resolution are generally superior using HAD1417MCW.

concepts.name: Clinical image quality comparison
concepts.evidence: After comparing a broad review of plain radiographic images taken with the HAD1417MCW of ADD and the S4335AW of GR40CW

concepts.name: Radiologist grading criteria
concepts.evidence: Method: for each of image, one radiologist evaluated the images according to the criteria that is prepared by manufacturer. Check grade: S, A, B, C

concepts.name: Spatial and soft tissue contrast resolution
concepts.evidence: In general, both the spatial and soft tissue contrast resolution are superior using the HAD1417MCW of ADD.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is inferred from source metadata/path and authoritySignal FDA; the source text itself does not state an FDA decision, clearance number, or regulatory status.
Objective device evidence is conflicting: the report identifies HAD1417MCW of ADD by H&Abyz Co., Ltd. and also states Objective Device: DIAMOND-series made by DRGEM Corporation.
Some extracted text appears to contain OCR or transcription errors, including DCIOM 3.0, SW4335AW, and wording such as Sternal Angel.
The source does not provide a 510(k) number, FDA clearance status, or formal authority-issued document metadata.
